title: Amethyst x granite
description: Amethyst blocks replace the ugly design of the granite blocks
body:
# Amethyst x Granite Resourcepack
![amethyst](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/i98wIGHB/images/95c53a74f16e7dbf5c75645f9f97ee4d585bdde4.png)
This resource pack changes the default Granite and polished granite block
for some textures like amethyst. So you can have now Stairs, walls and new blocks that
looks like amethyst blocks.
